narrative:
Precinct Jackson Township (precinct in Vinton County) has 448 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.5 percentage points.
